description: A season ticket holder reports that they have lost their physical season ticket booklet.

nodes.task_description: Look up the season ticket holder's account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the account and verifies their identity.

nodes.task_description: Deactivate the barcodes for the lost physical tickets to prevent fraudulent use.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully voids the old ticket barcodes.

nodes.task_description: Re-issue the rest of the season's tickets as digital, mobile-only tickets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the customer a new set of digital tickets.

nodes.task_description: Explain to the customer how to access and use their new digital tickets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the new process to the customer.
